economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from 0388.HK/official-reports/annual-reports/annual_report_fy2024.pdf and 0388.HK/investor-documents/ir-0388.hk/260316sr_e.pdf; component schedule reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Bounded estimate from filing-backed owner-cash and volume-cycle reserve; not a committee-approved price target.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ADT mean-reversion and margin-fund normalization bands.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows economic claim, cash conversion, or volume normalization materially worse than low case.

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
